items.title_en: Whistleblower claims ex-DOGE member says he took Social Security data to new job
items.title_zh: 举报者称前 DOGE 成员表示他将社会保障数据带到新工作单位
items.summary_en: A whistleblower alleges that a former member of a group known as DOGE transferred Social Security data to a new employer, implying a potential insider data breach of highly sensitive personal information. The claim highlights ongoing risks from employee mobility and the need for stronger data governance, access controls, and audit trails when handling national identifiers.
items.summary_zh: 举报者称一名前 DOGE 成员将社会保障数据带到了新雇主，暗示可能发生了涉及高度敏感个人信息的内部泄露。此事凸显员工流动带来的持续风险，以及在处理国民标识数据时加强数据治理、访问控制和审计追踪的必要性。

items.title_en: Temporal: A nine-year journey to fix time in JavaScript
items.title_zh: Temporal：九年修复 JavaScript 时间问题的历程
items.summary_en: Temporal is the long-awaited overhaul of time handling in JavaScript that replaces the brittle Date API with a set of timezone-, calendar-, and precision-aware primitives. After nearly a decade of design and iteration, it provides clear types for instants, zoned datetimes, durations, and intervals, eliminating many common bugs and making robust temporal logic practical in web and server code.
items.summary_zh: Temporal 是对 JavaScript 时间处理的重大改进，取代了易出错的 Date API，提供了对时区、历法和精度敏感的原语。经过多年的设计，它引入了瞬时、带时区的日期时间、时长和区间等清晰类型，减少常见错误并让可靠的时间逻辑在前后端都变得可行。

items.title_en: Lego's 0.002mm specification and its implications for manufacturing (2025)
items.title_zh: 乐高 0.002mm 规格及其对制造业的启示（2025）
items.summary_en: LEGO's astonishingly tight tolerances—on the order of microns—are a core part of why its bricks interlock reliably after decades and across suppliers. That level of specification forces disciplined manufacturing, quality control, and supplier coordination, and the analysis shows how tight tolerances can drive product longevity, modularity, and the economics of precision mass production.
items.summary_zh: 乐高极其严格的公差（精确到微米量级）是其积木几十年后仍能可靠互锁的关键。如此精细的规格要求严格的制造与质量控制以及供应商协同，说明高精度公差如何推动产品耐久性、模块化以及精密大规模生产的经济性。

items.title_en: Entities enabling scientific fraud at scale are large, resilient, growing (2025)
items.title_zh: 促进大规模科学造假的实体体量大、韧性强且在增长（2025）
items.summary_en: A study maps and quantifies organized entities that produce fraudulent scientific outputs at scale, finding they are sizable, resilient to takedowns, and expanding their reach. The results highlight a structural threat to research integrity that automated detection, publisher policies, and coordinated cross-journal defenses must address to protect the scientific record.
items.summary_zh: 研究绘制并量化了以规模化方式生产伪造科研成果的组织，发现这些实体体量大、对打击具有韧性且在扩张。结论指出科研诚信正面临结构性威胁，需要自动化检测、出版方政策和跨期刊的协同防御来维护学术记录。

items.title_en: BitNet: 100B Param 1-Bit model for local CPUs
items.title_zh: 微软 BitNet：用于本地 CPU 的 1000 亿参数 1 位模型
items.summary_en: Microsoft's BitNet packs a 100B-parameter model into a 1-bit representation aimed at running on local CPUs, trading precision for dramatic reductions in memory and bandwidth. If effective, this approach could broaden access to large models without GPUs, but will hinge on inference quality, latency, and compatibility with existing stacks.
items.summary_zh: 微软的 BitNet 将 1000 亿参数模型压缩为 1 位表示，目标是在本地 CPU 上运行以大幅降低内存和带宽需求。该方案若能在精度和延迟上取得平衡，可能让无需 GPU 的设备也能使用大模型，但最终效果取决于推理质量和软件生态兼容性。

items.title_en: Faster asin() was hiding in plain sight
items.title_zh: 更快的 asin() 原来一直显而易见
items.summary_en: A math/engineering post reveals a simpler, faster algorithm for computing asin() by exploiting identities and low-cost approximations that were previously overlooked. The trick yields measurable speedups in numerical libraries and graphics code, though users must weigh performance gains against precision and edge-case behavior.
items.summary_zh: 一篇技术文章展示了利用数学恒等式和廉价近似可以实现更快的 asin() 计算方法，这些手法此前被忽视。该技巧能在数值库和图形代码中带来显著加速，但在使用时需要在性能提升与精度、边界情况之间权衡。

items.title_en: Create value for others and don’t worry about the returns
items.title_zh: 为他人创造价值，别过分担心回报
items.summary_en: A mindset shift that values creating real utility for others over chasing immediate financial returns. The piece urges builders to focus on impact, open collaboration, and sustainable practices rather than ROI alone.
items.summary_zh: 强调把为他人创造实用价值放在首位，而不是只追逐短期回报。文章倡导专注于影响力、开放协作和可持续做法，而非单纯看 ROI。

items.title_en: Tony Hoare has died
items.title_zh: 托尼·霍尔去世
items.summary_en: Renowned computer scientist Tony Hoare passed away, leaving a lasting legacy in formal methods, algorithm theory, and programming language design. His work, including Hoare logic and CSP, underpins modern verification, concurrency theory, and software correctness discussions.
items.summary_zh: 著名计算机科学家托尼·霍尔去世，正式方法、算法理论和编程语言设计方面的贡献深远。他提出的霍尔逻辑和 CSP 等奠定了现代形式化验证、并发理论与软件正确性讨论的基石。

items.title_en: Wiz joins Google
items.title_zh: Wiz 加入 Google
items.summary_en: Google has completed the acquisition of Wiz, a cloud security firm, signaling a push to strengthen Google Cloud's security portfolio and compete more directly on cloud-native threat detection and posture management. Customers can expect Wiz technology to be integrated into Google's offerings, heightening focus on managed security services and SaaS-native defenses.
items.summary_zh: Google 完成了对云安全公司 Wiz 的收购，表明其正加强 Google Cloud 的安全产品线以更直接地竞争云原生威胁检测与态势管理。用户可预期 Wiz 的技术将融入 Google 的服务，推动对托管安全和 SaaS 原生防御的重视。

items.title_en: Where Some See Strings, She Sees a Space-Time Made of Fractals
items.title_zh: 当有人看到弦论，她却看到由分形构成的时空
items.summary_en: A researcher proposes modeling spacetime with fractal geometry rather than traditional string-theory frameworks, arguing that scale-dependent, self-similar structures could offer fresh insights into quantum gravity. The idea is provocative: it reframes familiar puzzles about locality and scale and suggests new mathematical tools and phenomenology to test against quantum and cosmological observations.
items.summary_zh: 一位研究者提出用分形几何来描述时空，认为尺度依赖且自相似的结构能为量子引力带来新视角。这个设想颠覆了对局域性和尺度问题的传统看法，并提出可用新的数学工具和观测来检验的可行路径。

items.title_en: AI Agent Hacks McKinsey
items.title_zh: AI 代理入侵麦肯锡的平台
items.summary_en: Researchers used an autonomous AI agent to probe weaknesses in McKinsey's AI platform, extracting or manipulating data in ways that highlight gaps in authentication and input sanitization. The experiment illustrates how automation can amplify attack speed and subtlety, pressing enterprises to harden model endpoints and monitoring.
items.summary_zh: 研究者利用自主 AI 代理对麦肯锡的 AI 平台进行探测，能以自动化方式提取或操控数据，暴露了身份验证与输入过滤的薄弱环节。该演示表明自动化会放大攻击的速度与隐蔽性，促使企业加强模型端点的防护与监控。

items.title_en: Show HN: Vanilla JavaScript refinery simulator built to explain job to my kids
items.title_zh: Show HN：用纯 JavaScript 写成的炼油厂模拟器，用来向孩子解释我的工作
items.summary_en: A browser-based refinery simulator, written in vanilla JavaScript, models core processes so kids can visually explore how a refinery works through interactive components and simplified flows. It's a good example of using small, focused simulations to teach complex industrial systems in an approachable way.
items.summary_zh: 这个用纯 JavaScript 实现的浏览器炼油厂模拟器通过交互式组件和简化流程让孩子直观探索炼油工作原理。它示范了用小型、针对性的模拟来以易懂方式教授复杂工业系统的有效方法。

items.title_en: Show HN: Klaus – OpenClaw on a VM, batteries included
items.title_zh: Show HN：Klaus — 在虚拟机上运行 OpenClaw 的开箱即用方案
items.summary_en: Klaus packages OpenClaw into a VM image with everything preconfigured so you can run the system locally with minimal setup. It lowers the barrier to experimenting with the project by bundling dependencies, example datasets, and management tools, making it handy for demos, learning, or isolated deployments—though it'll still demand VM resources.
items.summary_zh: Klaus 将 OpenClaw 打包为开箱即用的虚拟机镜像，包含预配置环境以便快速本地运行。它通过捆绑依赖、示例数据集和管理工具，降低试验门槛，适合演示、学习或隔离部署，但仍需要相应的虚拟机资源。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Is Claude down again?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：Claude 又宕机了吗？
items.summary_en: Users are reporting intermittent outages of Claude, pointing to reliability issues with hosted LLM services that can disrupt workflows and product features. The thread underscores the need for better status transparency, fallback strategies, and multi-provider redundancy when critical functionality depends on third-party models.
items.summary_zh: 用户报告称 Claude 出现间歇性中断，暴露了托管大型语言模型服务在可靠性方面的问题，可能影响工作流与产品功能。讨论凸显了在关键功能依赖第三方模型时，需要更好的状态透明度、回退策略与多供应商冗余。

items.title_en: Why the global elite gave up on spelling and grammar
items.title_zh: 为什么全球精英放弃了拼写与语法
items.summary_en: The argument is that many elites no longer prioritize perfect spelling and grammar because communication has become delegated, fast, and platform-driven—assistants, multilingual contexts, and informal norms shift the cost-benefit calculus. The change reflects how status signaling and practical efficiency now often outweigh prescriptive language correctness in elite circles.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，许多精英不再把拼写与语法放在首位，原因是沟通变得可委派、讲求速度并受平台驱动——助理、多语境和非正式规范改变了对语言规范的权衡。此变化反映了在精英圈中，地位信号和效率常常优先于刻板的语言正确性。

items.title_en: Fungal Electronics
items.title_zh: 真菌电子学
items.summary_en: Research on 'fungal electronics' explores how mycelial networks conduct electricity and exhibit nonlinear, memristive behaviors that could be harnessed for sensing, low-power computation, or biohybrid circuits. The work is interdisciplinary and early-stage: it shows intriguing physical properties and proof-of-concept devices, but practical applications will require much more engineering and reliability work.
items.summary_zh: “真菌电子学”研究了菌丝网络的电导性及其非线性、类忆阻行为，可能用于感测、低功耗计算或生物混合电路。该领域跨学科且处于早期阶段，虽然有有趣的物理特性与概念性器件，但要实现实用化还需大量工程和可靠性方面的工作。

items.title_en: The MacBook Neo
items.title_zh: MacBook Neo
items.summary_en: An opinion piece examines the concept and implications of a 'MacBook Neo'—how new design choices, feature trade-offs, and product positioning might reshape Apple's laptop line and user expectations. It considers where Apple might innovate versus where customers will expect continuity in performance, ports, and battery life.
items.summary_zh: 一篇评论性文章探讨了“MacBook Neo”这一概念及其影响，讨论新的设计取舍和产品定位如何可能重塑苹果笔记本系列与用户预期。文章权衡了苹果可能带来的创新与用户对性能、接口和续航连续性的期望。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open-source browser for AI agents
items.title_zh: Show HN：开源的 AI 代理浏览器
items.summary_en: This open-source project defines a browser protocol and interface for running, visualizing, and interacting with autonomous AI agents inside the browser. By standardizing agent communications and providing a UI, it makes experimentation with multiple-agent setups and debugging easier for developers building agent-based systems.
items.summary_zh: 该开源项目为在浏览器中运行、可视化和交互的自治 AI 代理定义了协议与界面。通过规范代理通信并提供用户界面，它让开发者更方便地实验多代理配置并调试基于代理的系统。

items.title_en: Zig – Type Resolution Redesign and Language Changes
items.title_zh: Zig 重构类型解析与语言特性的变更
items.summary_en: Zig's type resolution is undergoing a redesign, altering how the compiler infers and resolves types alongside accompanying language changes. The update affects compile times, error messages, and ergonomics for systems programming in Zig.
items.summary_zh: Zig 的类型解析将重新设计，改变编译器对类型的推断与解析方式，并伴随语言层面的变更。此升级影响编译速度、错误信息的呈现以及系统编程的开发体验。

items.title_en: Cloudflare crawl endpoint
items.title_zh: Cloudflare 新增抓取端点
items.summary_en: Cloudflare introduces a new crawl endpoint to help developers test and observe how Cloudflare's bot crawls their site. The endpoint aids debugging for SEO and understanding crawl behavior behind protections.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 推出新的抓取端点，帮助开发者测试并观察其爬虫对站点的抓取方式。此端点有助于 SEO 调试以及在保护机制下理解爬虫行为。

items.title_en: Swiss e-voting pilot can't count 2,048 ballots after decryption failure
items.title_zh: 瑞士电子投票试点因解密失败无法计数 2,048 张选票
items.summary_en: A Swiss e‑voting pilot failed to decrypt 2,048 ballots, meaning those votes couldn't be automatically tallied and raising questions about the reliability and auditability of the system. The incident underscores the fragility of end-to-end electronic voting workflows and the need for robust fallback and transparent verification mechanisms.
items.summary_zh: 一项瑞士电子投票试点在解密过程中失败，导致 2,048 张选票无法自动计票，暴露了系统可靠性与可审计性问题。该事件凸显端到端电子投票流程的脆弱性，强调了健全回退方案与透明验证机制的必要性。

items.title_en: U+237C ⍼ Is Azimuth
items.title_zh: U+237C ⍼ 是否为方位符号
items.summary_en: Debates the meaning of Unicode symbol U+237C ⍼, focusing on whether it represents an azimuth and how such obscure symbols are encoded and rendered. The discussion highlights typography and encoding edge cases that matter for map UI and font design.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 Unicode 字符 U+237C ⍼ 是否代表方位符号，并关注边缘符号在编码与字体显示中的处理。内容涉及排版、符号分类，以及对地图界面和字体设计的实际影响。

items.title_en: Let yourself fall down more
items.title_zh: 多让自己摔倒一些
items.summary_en: The essay argues for embracing frequent, low-cost failures as a strategy for learning and growth: deliberately taking small risks accelerates iteration, builds resilience, and yields faster skill development than avoiding mistakes. Practically, it recommends reframing failures as experiments and designing feedback loops to extract lessons quickly.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张将频繁且成本低的小失败作为学习与成长的策略：刻意承担小风险能加速迭代、培养抗压性并比回避错误更快提升技能。实践上建议把失败看作试验，并构建反馈回路以迅速汲取经验。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Prism (YC X25) – Workspace and API to generate and edit videos
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Prism（YC X25）—— 生成与编辑视频的工作区与 API
items.summary_en: Prism offers a workspace and API that let developers generate and edit videos programmatically, likely leveraging AI to automate production tasks like cuts, overlays, and transformations. The service targets teams that want to integrate video creation into pipelines and apps, reducing manual editing overhead and enabling dynamic content generation at scale.
items.summary_zh: Prism 提供一个工作区和 API，使开发者能够以编程方式生成与编辑视频，可能借助 AI 自动化剪辑、叠加与转场等任务。该服务面向希望将视频创作融入工作流与应用的团队，降低人工编辑成本并支持大规模动态内容生成。

items.title_en: After outages, Amazon to make senior engineers sign off on AI-assisted changes
items.title_zh: 故障后，亚马逊要求高级工程师对AI辅助变更签字批准
items.summary_en: Amazon introduces governance requiring senior engineers to approve AI-assisted changes before deployment after outages. This aims to improve safety, accountability, and rollback capabilities for critical systems in an AI-augmented ops environment.
items.summary_zh: 为加强关键系统的安全性和可追溯性，亚马逊宣布在故障后实施 AI 辅助变更需高级工程师签字批准的治理规则，确保可回滚与问责。

items.title_en: WA income tax clears House after 24-hour debate
items.title_zh: 华州议会在24小时辩论后通过所得税法案
items.summary_en: Washington state's House passed an income tax after a marathon 24‑hour debate, marking a significant shift for a state long reliant on sales and property taxes. The move could reshape revenue distribution and public spending, but faces further legislative steps and political contention.
items.summary_zh: 华盛顿州众议院在长达24小时的辩论后通过了所得税案，这对长期依赖销售税和财产税的州财政结构来说是一次重要变化。该举措可能重塑收入分配与公共支出，但仍需后续立法程序并将面临激烈的政治争论。

items.title_en: Making WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web
items.title_zh: 让 WebAssembly 成为 Web 上的一等语言
items.summary_en: Efforts to make WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web focus on richer runtime features—like GC, component model, interface types, and better debugging—to let high-level languages interoperate and be authored for the browser without forcing JavaScript as the only host. If successful, this work would broaden language choice for web apps, improve performance portability, and unlock tooling and deployment patterns closer to native languages.
items.summary_zh: 将 WebAssembly 打造成 Web 上的一等语言需要补齐运行时功能（如垃圾回收、组件模型、接口类型和更好的调试支持），以便高阶语言能无缝互操作并原生面向浏览器。若能实现，这将扩展网页的语言选择、提升性能可移植性，并带来更接近本地开发的工具链和部署方式。

items.title_en: Online age-verification tools for child safety are surveilling adults
items.title_zh: 面向儿童安全的线上年龄验证工具正在监控成年人
items.summary_en: Age-verification tools designed for child safety are collecting data on adults, creating surveillance for a broader audience. The piece argues for privacy-centric designs and stricter data governance to prevent abuse.
items.summary_zh: 为儿童安全而设计的在线年龄验证工具，正在对成年用户进行数据收集和监控，带来隐私风险。需要在设计和治理层面加强隐私保护，避免对成年人造成不必要的监控。

items.title_en: Agents that run while I sleep
items.title_zh: 睡梦中运行的智能代理
items.summary_en: The author prototypes autonomous, long-running agents that persist across sessions and wake on signals, illustrating challenges in reliability, state management, and safety when agents operate unattended.
items.summary_zh: 作者在原型中实现能跨会话持续运行、收到触发信号便自启动的自治代理，凸显无人值守运行下的可靠性、状态管理与安全性挑战。

items.title_en: Universal vaccine against respiratory infections and allergens
items.title_zh: 针对呼吸道感染与过敏的通用疫苗取得进展
items.summary_en: The Stanford team reports a universal vaccine candidate that targets conserved elements across multiple respiratory pathogens and allergens, showing preclinical promise. If successful, it could reshape vaccination strategies and reduce a broad spectrum of illnesses.
items.summary_zh: 斯坦福团队公布了针对多种呼吸道病原体和过敏原的通用疫苗候选，显示在保守区域的免疫靶点上具有前景。若成功，这种策略可能改变疫苗接种思路，降低多类疾病的风险。

items.title_en: Meta acquires Moltbook
items.title_zh: Meta 收购 Moltbook
items.summary_en: Meta acquires Moltbook, likely to bolster its social networking slate around AI agents or analytics. The deal signals Meta's continued interest in agent-enabled social experiences.
items.summary_zh: Meta 收购 Moltbook，强化其在面向 AI 代理的社交网络与相关能力的布局。此举反映 Meta 对代理型社交体验的持续投入。

items.title_en: Writing my own text editor, and daily-driving it
items.title_zh: 写自己的文本编辑器，并日常使用它
items.summary_en: An unabashed write‑from‑scratch project: the author built a personal text editor and uses it daily, sharing lessons on tradeoffs, ergonomics, and the tension between minimalism and feature richness. It serves as a practical case study for tool design tailored to one’s own workflow.
items.summary_zh: 作者从零开始构建并每日使用自己的文本编辑器，分享对取舍、手感与极简主义与功能丰富性之间张力的思考。为定制化工作流下的工具设计提供了实用的案例研究。

items.title_en: RISC-V Is Sloooow
items.title_zh: RISC-V 真慢
items.summary_en: RISC-V performance and ecosystem maturity face scrutiny as real-world workloads lag behind established ISAs like x86 and ARM.
items.summary_zh: 在真实工作负载下，RISC-V 的性能与生态成熟度被质疑，与 x86/ARM 等成熟生态相比仍存在差距。文章聚焦工具链、编译器与硬件成熟度的不平衡对实际吞吐量和普及的影响。

items.title_en: Yann LeCun raises $1B to build AI that understands the physical world
items.title_zh: Yann LeCun 筹集十亿美元打造理解物理世界的 AI
items.summary_en: Yann LeCun launches a billion-dollar fund to build AI systems that integrate perception, reasoning, and physical-world understanding. The effort signals a push toward grounding AI in real-world sensors and physics-based reasoning, with potential robotics implications.
items.summary_zh: Yann LeCun 领衔的十亿美元基金，目标打造具备感知、推理和物理世界理解能力的 AI 系统。该方向强调把 AI 与现实世界传感与物理规律结合，可能带来机器人等应用的突破。

items.title_en: Debian decides not to decide on AI-generated contributions
items.title_zh: Debian 决定不就 AI 生成的贡献作出决定
items.summary_en: Debian delays policy on AI-generated contributions, leaving patch authorship and licensing rules unresolved. The move signals ongoing tension between openness, licensing, and automation in community-driven projects.
items.summary_zh: Debian 延迟就 AI 生成贡献的相关政策，尚未就署名、许可等规则定案。此举反映开源社区在开放性、许可与自动化之间的持续博弈。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a tool that watches webpages and exposes changes as RSS
items.title_zh: Show HN：我做了一个监视网页并把变化曝露为 RSS 的工具
items.summary_en: This tool watches web pages for changes and exposes detected updates as RSS feeds, letting users integrate page monitoring into existing feed readers and automation pipelines. It's a lightweight solution for tracking content that lacks native feeds or APIs, useful for alerts, scraping alternatives, and simple change detection.
items.summary_zh: 该工具监视网页变化并将检测到的更新以 RSS 形式输出，便于用户在现有阅读器或自动化流程中集成监控。它是跟踪缺少原生订阅或 API 的内容的轻量方案，适合用于警报、替代抓取及简单变更检测。

items.title_en: I put my whole life into a single database
items.title_zh: 将几乎人生放进一个数据库的个人故事，揭示隐私与数据控制的议题
items.summary_en: A personal story about consolidating nearly every aspect of life into one database and what that means for privacy, control, and data portability.
items.summary_zh: 将几乎人生放入一个数据库的个人故事，揭示隐私、控制权与数据可携带性等议题。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built an ISP infrastructure emulator from scratch with a custom vBNG
items.title_zh: Show HN：我从零实现了一个 ISP 基础设施模拟器并自制 vBNG
items.summary_en: An open-source ISP emulator implements core carrier functions, including a custom virtual Broadband Network Gateway (vBNG), allowing operators and researchers to simulate subscriber, routing, and policy behaviors locally. It's useful for testing network changes, training, and reproducing carrier scenarios without access to physical gear.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源的 ISP 模拟器实现了核心运营商功能，并自制了虚拟宽带网络网关(vBNG)，可在本地模拟用户、路由与策略行为。它便于在没有实体设备的情况下进行网络变更测试、培训和运营场景复现。

items.title_en: UK MPs give ministers powers to restrict Internet for under 18s
items.title_zh: 英国议员赋予部长限制18岁以下互联网访问的权力
items.summary_en: Parliamentary backing gives ministers new authority to impose age‑based internet restrictions for under‑18s, potentially mandating default controls across services. The move raises practical and civil‑liberties questions about enforceability, overblocking, and how age verification or content filtering would be implemented at scale.
items.summary_zh: 议会支持赋予部长对18岁以下群体的互联网访问实施年龄限制的新权力，可能要求各类服务采用默认控制措施。此举带来可执行性和公民自由方面的问题，包括过度屏蔽、年龄验证方式以及大规模实施内容过滤的技术与监管挑战。

items.title_en: TADA: Speech generation through text-acoustic synchronization
items.title_zh: TADA：通过文—声同步实现语音生成
items.summary_en: TADA introduces a speech-generation approach that synchronizes text and acoustic representations to produce more natural and controllable speech, and the implementation is open-sourced. By aligning linguistic timing and prosodic features, it offers improved expressiveness and easier control over voice characteristics compared with some end-to-end models.
items.summary_zh: TADA 提出一种通过文本与声学表征同步来生成语音的方法，并已开源实现。通过对齐语音时序与韵律特征，它在表现力和对声线特性的可控性上相较某些端到端模型有改进。

items.title_en: NASA's Dart Mission Changed Orbit of Asteroid Didymos Around Sun
items.title_zh: NASA 的 DART 任务改变了双星小行星 Didymos 绕太阳的轨道
items.summary_en: The DART impact altered the mutual orbit of the Didymos binary system and measurably changed its heliocentric trajectory, demonstrating that kinetic deflection can modify an asteroid's orbit around the Sun. This is the first operational test showing planetary defense techniques can produce lasting orbital effects, informing future mitigation strategies.
items.summary_zh: DART 撞击改变了 Didymos 双星系统的互绕轨道，并可测量地修正了其绕太阳的轨道，证明动能偏转能改变小行星的太阳轨道。作为首次实战检验，这为未来行星防御策略提供了可持续轨道改变的实证依据。

items.title_en: Searching for the Agentic IDE
items.title_zh: 寻找具代理性的 IDE
items.summary_en: The idea of an 'agentic IDE' imagines development environments where AI agents take initiative—executing tasks, proposing changes, and autonomously running workflows—while preserving developer control and safety. Key challenges include defining authority boundaries, observability for agent actions, and UX patterns that let humans supervise and correct agent behavior effectively.
items.summary_zh: “具代理性的 IDE”设想了一个由 AI 代理主动执行任务、提议改动并自主运行工作流的开发环境，同时保留开发者的控制权与安全保障。主要挑战在于界定代理权限、为其行为提供可观测性，以及设计便于人类监督与纠正的交互模式。

items.title_en: Redox OS has adopted a Certificate of Origin policy and a strict no-LLM policy
items.title_zh: Redox OS 采纳证书来源政策并严格执行不得使用大语言模型
items.summary_en: Redox OS now requires a Certificate of Origin for contributions and bans any use of large language models in development or contributions. The change tightens provenance and governance, reflecting rising concerns about licensing, data usage, and IP in open-source projects. It may influence how other community-driven systems manage safety, licensing and contributor trust.
items.summary_zh: Redox OS 现在要求贡献者提供证书原产地证明，并执行严格的不得使用大语言模型的规定。此举强化了贡献链的可追溯性与治理，反映出开源项目中对许可、数据使用与知识产权的日益关注。此政策或影响其他以社区为驱动的系统在安全、许可与贡献信任方面的做法。

items.title_en: Ig Nobel award ceremony moving to Zurich due to concern over U.S. travel visas
items.title_zh: 为避免美国签证问题，恶搞诺贝尔移师苏黎世
items.summary_en: The Ig Nobel organizers are relocating the ceremony to Zurich because visa barriers to the U.S. could prevent international winners from attending. The decision spotlights how immigration and visa policies can affect international scientific exchange and cultural events.
items.summary_zh: 因担忧赴美签证限制会阻碍国际获奖者出席，恶搞诺贝尔颁奖典礼决定迁至苏黎世举行。此举凸显移民与签证政策如何影响国际学术交流与文化活动的可及性。

items.title_en: FFmpeg-over-IP – Connect to remote FFmpeg servers
items.title_zh: FFmpeg-over-IP：远程连接 FFmpeg 服务器
items.summary_en: A tool enabling FFmpeg to connect to and orchestrate remote servers over IP, enabling distributed transcoding pipelines. It can simplify media workflows but introduces network latency and security considerations.
items.summary_zh: 一个工具使 FFmpeg 能通过 IP 连接并编排远程服务器，支持分布式转码工作流，简化媒体处理；同时需要关注网络延迟与安全性。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Sentrial (YC W26) – Catch AI Agent Failures Before Your Users Do
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Sentrial（YC W26）—— 在用户之前捕捉 AI 代理故障
items.summary_en: Sentrial provides monitoring and alerting tailored to AI agents, surfacing failures, regressions, and anomalous behavior before they impact end users. As agent-driven features proliferate, such observability layers become critical for reliability, safety enforcement, and root-cause analysis in production.
items.summary_zh: Sentrial 提供专为 AI 代理设计的监控与告警，及时发现故障、回退与异常行为以避免影响最终用户。随着代理驱动功能增多，这类可观测性层对生产环境的可靠性、安全执行与故障定位将变得至关重要。

items.title_en: Launch HN: RunAnywhere (YC W26) – Faster AI Inference on Apple Silicon
items.title_zh: Launch HN：RunAnwhere（YC W26）——在 Apple Silicon 上实现更快的 AI 推理
items.summary_en: RunAnwhere aims to speed up AI inference on Apple Silicon with an optimized runtime or toolchain, leveraging Metal/ML accelerators. This lowers latency and lets developers deploy larger models locally on Macs.
items.summary_zh: RunAnwhere 通过为 Apple Silicon 优化的推理运行时/工具链，提升本地 AI 推理速度，降低延迟。适合在 Mac 上本地部署更大模型，提升开发效率。

items.title_en: Standardizing source maps
items.title_zh: 标准化源映射
items.summary_en: Standardizing how source maps are produced and consumed across toolchains would reduce debugging friction for minified and polyglot code. A common spec enables reliable source-level debugging across browsers and build systems.
items.summary_zh: 统一跨工具链的源映射生成与消费标准，将降低对混淆代码的调试困难。共享的规范可实现跨浏览器和构建系统的可靠源级调试。

items.title_en: Hurricane Electric (HE.NET) IPv6 tunnelbroker page offline due to expired domain
items.title_zh: Hurricane Electric（HE.NET）IPv6 tunnelbroker 页面因域名过期而下线
items.summary_en: An expired domain caused the IPv6 tunnelbroker service to go offline, disrupting users who rely on the tunnel for IPv6 connectivity. The outage is a reminder that critical network services can hinge on mundane administrative tasks like domain renewal and highlights the operational risks of single points of failure.
items.summary_zh: 域名过期导致 IPv6 tunnelbroker 服务中断，影响依赖该隧道获取 IPv6 连接的用户。此次故障提醒我们关键网络服务可能被域名续费等日常运维问题所左右，暴露了单点故障带来的运营风险。

items.title_en: Levels of Agentic Engineering
items.title_zh: 代理性工程的等级划分
items.summary_en: A taxonomy of agentic engineering levels, clarifying what degree of autonomy or initiative AI systems should have in different contexts.
items.summary_zh: 对代理性工程的等级进行分层，阐明不同场景下 AI 系统应具备的自治与主动性程度。

items.title_en: SSH Secret Menu
items.title_zh: SSH 秘密菜单
items.summary_en: An exploration of an SSH 'secret menu', a hidden interface for quick commands or configuration access. It highlights productivity tricks while flagging security considerations when exposing or sharing such features.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个 SSH 的“秘密菜单”概念，即隐藏界面用于快速执行命令或切换配置。强调提高效率的同时，也需关注将此类特性暴露给他人时的安全性。

items.title_en: AutoKernel: Autoresearch for GPU Kernels
items.title_zh: AutoKernel：针对 GPU 内核的自动化研究工具
items.summary_en: AutoKernel automates search and tuning of GPU kernels, using autoresearch techniques to discover high‑performance implementations without manual CUDA optimization. This can accelerate performance engineering and help developers get closer to peak hardware efficiency with less bespoke effort.
items.summary_zh: AutoKernel 通过自动化搜索和调优 GPU 内核，利用自研究方法发现高性能实现，减少手工 CUDA 优化需求。该工具能加快性能工程工作，帮助开发者以更少定制化投入靠近硬件峰值效率。

items.title_en: Where did you think the training data was coming from?
items.title_zh: 你以为训练数据是从哪里来的？
items.summary_en: The write‑up questions common assumptions about where large AI training datasets originate, pointing to extensive scraping of consumer devices and permissive photo sources like wearables. It highlights privacy and consent gaps that can haunt applied models, especially when training material includes identifiable faces or proprietary content.
items.summary_zh: 文章质疑人们对大型 AI 训练数据来源的默认认知，指出大量数据来自抓取消费者设备和权限较松的照片源（如可穿戴设备）。文中强调了隐私与同意的缺口，尤其是在训练数据包含可识别面孔或专有内容时，这些问题会带来长远风险。

items.title_en: Mesh over Bluetooth LE, TCP, or Reticulum
items.title_zh: Columba 的多传输网状网络：BLE、TCP 与 Reticulum
items.summary_en: Columba demonstrates mesh networking across multiple transport layers: Bluetooth LE, TCP, or Reticulum. The project emphasizes resilience, offline operation, and interoperability for IoT and distributed apps.
items.summary_zh: Columba 展示了一个可在蓝牙 LE、TCP 或 Reticulum 等多种传输层之上的网状网络。该项目强调韧性、离线运行和设备间互操作性，适用于物联网和分布式应用。

items.title_en: We are building data breach machines and nobody cares
items.title_zh: 我们正在打造数据泄露机器，没人关心
items.summary_en: A provocative reflection on the creation of automated data-exfiltration tools and the lax attention to security risks. Advocates for more proactive defense work.
items.summary_zh: 对自动化数据泄露工具的开发及安全风险被忽视的现状进行尖锐反思，呼吁加强防守与合规意识。

items.title_en: HyperCard discovery: Neuromancer, Count Zero, Mona Lisa Overdrive (2022)
items.title_zh: HyperCard 发现：Neuromancer、Count Zero、Mona Lisa Overdrive（2022）
items.summary_en: A 2022 HyperCard discovery project uncovers artifacts linked to Gibson's cyberpunk trilogy, showing how retro platforms can host digital artifacts and spur preservation efforts that blend literature with early hypermedia.
items.summary_zh: 2022 年的 HyperCard 发现项目揭示了与吉布森赛博朋克三部曲相关的数字遗产，展示了复古平台承载数字藏品并推动早期超媒体保存的潜力。

items.title_en: I built a programming language using Claude Code
items.title_zh: 我用 Claude Code 构建了一门编程语言
items.summary_en: A hands-on experiment building a small programming language powered by Claude Code.
items.summary_zh: 尝试用 Claude Code 构建一门小型编程语言，分享在语言工具链中使用 Claude 的优劣、代码生成质量与潜在局限。

items.title_en: Tell HN: Apple development certificate server seems down?
items.title_zh: 苹果开发者证书服务器宕机？
items.summary_en: Reports of an outage at Apple’s development certificate server affecting code signing and builds. The post shares glimpses of impact and practical workarounds for developers awaiting service restoration.
items.summary_zh: 报道显示苹果开发者证书服务器宕机，影响代码签名与构建。文中提供受影响开发者的影响概览及可用的临时应对策略。

items.title_en: Billion-Parameter Theories
items.title_zh: 十亿参数理论
items.summary_en: Explores the viability and limits of billion-parameter AI models, including scaling laws, data requirements, and deployment trade-offs. Argues that even billion-parameter systems face fundamental gaps without broader world grounding.
items.summary_zh: 讨论亿参数级 AI 模型的可行性与局限，涵盖扩展规律、数据需求与部署取舍。指出仅靠大规模参数无法解决对现实世界的理解等根本问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Ink – Deploy full-stack apps from AI agents via MCP or Skills
items.title_zh: Show HN：Ink — 通过 MCP 或 Skills 从 AI 代理部署全栈应用
items.summary_en: Ink provides a platform that lets AI agents generate, assemble, and deploy full‑stack applications using modular capabilities (MCP/Skills), automating much of the development pipeline. The approach accelerates prototype-to-deployment cycles but raises questions about testing, security, and governance of agent-generated production code.
items.summary_zh: Ink 提供了一个平台，使 AI 代理能利用模块化能力（MCP/Skills）生成、组装并部署全栈应用，从而自动化大量开发流程。该方法能加速从原型到部署，但也带来了对代理生成生产代码的测试、安全与治理方面的疑问。

items.title_en: Mother of All Grease Fires (1994)
items.title_zh: 油脂火灾之母（1994）
items.summary_en: Revisits a notorious grease-fire incident from 1994, offering a historical curiosity about safety culture and the era’s tech-adjacent storytelling.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 1994 年著名的油脂火灾事件，提供关于安全文化与当时技术叙事的历史趣闻。

items.title_en: Anthropic vs. Trump Administration: What Happens When Firms Push Back
items.title_zh: Anthropic 与特朗普政府对峙：企业反击会带来什么后果
items.summary_en: Anthropic's legal pushback against government action illustrates how AI firms can litigate policy decisions, turning regulatory disputes into precedent‑setting fights over national security and innovation controls. The case highlights tradeoffs firms face between compliance, public positioning, and defending commercial freedoms.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 向政府提起法律抗争展示了 AI 公司如何通过诉讼对抗政策决定，将监管争议变成可能确立先例的较量，涉及国家安全与创新管控。该案凸显企业在遵从、公共立场与维护商业自由之间的权衡。

items.title_en: PgAdmin 4 9.13 with AI Assistant Panel
items.title_zh: PgAdmin 4 9.13：新增 AI 助手面板
items.summary_en: PgAdmin 4.9.13 adds an AI Assistant panel to help generate SQL, optimize queries, or suggest visualizations inside the query tool. It signals a broader trend of embedding AI copilots in developer IDEs and database tools to boost productivity.
items.summary_zh: PgAdmin 4.9.13 新增 AI 助手面板，帮助生成和优化 SQL，并可给出可视化建议。反映了开发工具嵌入 AI 助手的趋势，提升数据库工作流效率。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Didit (YC W26) – Stripe for Identity Verification
items.title_zh: Didit（YC W26）——身份验证服务的 Stripe 式模式
items.summary_en: Didit offers identity verification as a service with a Stripe-like model, focusing on a simple integration and pricing based on verifications.
items.summary_zh: Didit 提供身份验证即服务，采用类似 Stripe 的计费与简易集成的 API，旨在降低用户注册过程的摩擦。

items.title_en: 1kB Club
items.title_zh: 1kB 俱乐部
items.summary_en: 1kB Club showcases projects and challenges constrained to 1 kilobyte, celebrating extreme code and asset minimalism. The community highlights creativity in tiny binaries or demos, useful as technical puzzles and exercises in efficient design.
items.summary_zh: 1kB 俱乐部汇集了受限于 1KB 的项目与挑战，彰显极致的代码与资源极简主义。这个社区通过微小二进制或演示作品展示创意，是检验高效设计和技术巧思的有趣练习。

items.title_en: Scientists revive activity in frozen mouse brains for the first time
items.title_zh: 科学家首次在冷冻小鼠脑中恢复活动
items.summary_en: Researchers have, for the first time, restored certain kinds of cellular and network activity in frozen mouse brains, advancing methods for tissue preservation and study after severe insult. The result opens experimental avenues for brain repair and cryopreservation research, while raising important ethical questions about brain function and consciousness in revived tissue.
items.summary_zh: 研究者首次在冷冻小鼠脑组织中恢复了部分细胞与网络活动，推进了严重损伤后组织保存与研究的方法学。该成果为脑修复与低温保存研究提供了新方向，但同时也带来关于脑功能与意识在被“唤醒”组织中伦理层面的重大疑问。

items.title_en: MacBook Neo Review: No Other Budget Laptop Can Compete
items.title_zh: MacBook Neo 评测：没有其他预算笔记本能匹敌
items.summary_en: Gizmodo’s take argues the MacBook Neo dominates the budget laptop segment, delivering efficiency, build quality, and battery life that rival pricier competitors. It reframes what ‘budget’ means in practice.
items.summary_zh: Gizmodo 的评测认为 MacBook Neo 在预算笔记本领域处于领先地位，凭借高效能、做工与续航等表现对标更贵的型号，重新定义了“预算”的含义。

items.title_en: JPMorgan marking down loan portfolios of private credit groups
items.title_zh: 摩根大通下调私人信贷集团的贷款组合估值
items.summary_en: JPMorgan has marked down portions of loan portfolios tied to private credit groups, reflecting deteriorating asset quality or tighter valuations in that sector. The adjustments signal stress in parts of the private lending market and could tighten funding or repricing pressure for similar credit managers and institutional investors.
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通对与私人信贷集团相关的部分贷款组合进行了下调，反映出该领域资产质量恶化或估值收紧。此类调整表明私募信贷市场某些环节承压，可能对同类信贷管理者和机构投资者带来融资与重定价压力。

items.title_en: Defeat as Method
items.title_zh: 失败作为方法
items.summary_en: A philosophical piece arguing that embracing defeat or failure can inform robust design and strategy. Offers a counterpoint to triumphalist thinking in engineering.
items.summary_zh: 一篇哲学性文章主张将失败视为方法论的一部分，以此引导更坚韧的设计与策略；对工程中的胜利至上思维提出质疑。

items.title_en: Open Weights isn't Open Training
items.title_zh: Open Weights 不是 Open Training
items.summary_en: The piece argues that Open Weights project doesn't equate to open training, raising questions about licensing, data provenance, and transparency in open weight ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出 Open Weights 不等同于 Open Training，探讨在开源权重生态中许可、数据来源与透明度等问题。

items.title_en: Surpassing vLLM with a Generated Inference Stack
items.title_zh: 用生成式推理栈超越 vLLM
items.summary_en: An engineering case study describes building a tailored inference stack for Qwen3 that outperforms vLLM by combining task‑aware generation strategies, memory management, and runtime optimizations. The result underscores how system-level co‑design—model, tokenizer, and scheduler—can yield practical throughput and latency gains beyond off‑the‑shelf runtimes.
items.summary_zh: 一个工程案例介绍了为 Qwen3 构建定制推理栈，通过任务感知的生成策略、内存管理与运行时优化实现超越 vLLM 的性能。结果表明模型、分词器与调度器的系统级协同设计能带来比通用运行时更显著的吞吐与延迟改进。

items.title_en: The Unmaking of the American University
items.title_zh: 美国大学的解体
items.summary_en: An examination of how American universities are undergoing structural changes under funding pressures and marketization.
items.summary_zh: 分析美国高校在资金压力和市场化压力下的结构性变革，探讨对研究、教育公平和科技人才培养生态的影响。

items.title_en: EQT eyes potential $6B sale of Linux pioneer SUSE, sources say
items.title_zh: EQT 考虑以约60亿美元出售 Linux 先驱 SUSE
items.summary_en: EQT is reportedly exploring a potential sale of SUSE for around $6B, signaling a significant strategic move for the company and the Linux ecosystem. A sale could reshape enterprise Linux dynamics and influence open‑source governance and investment.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，EQT 正在考虑以大约60亿美元出售 SUSE，这对公司及 Linux 生态系统意味着重要的战略动作。交易可能重塑企业级 Linux 的格局并影响开源治理与投资方向。

items.title_en: Show HN: What's my JND? – a colour guessing game
items.title_zh: Show HN：我的感知阈值是什么？——颜色猜测游戏
items.summary_en: A browser-based color-guessing game that challenges users to identify perceptual color differences, illustrating perceptual limits and color spaces. It’s a playful way to explore JND concepts and display calibration.
items.summary_zh: 一个基于浏览器的颜色猜测游戏，挑战用户识别感知中的颜色差异，展示感知极限与颜色空间。是探索最小可觉差（JND）与显示校准的有趣方式。

items.title_en: Revolut wins UK banking licence after five-year tussle
items.title_zh: Revolut 终获英国银行牌照，历经五年斗争
items.summary_en: After five years of regulatory back‑and‑forth, Revolut secured a UK banking licence, enabling it to offer protected deposits and expand regulated services domestically. The approval removes a key barrier for growth but comes with closer supervision and expectations around compliance and capital rules.
items.summary_zh: 经过五年与监管机构的反复交涉，Revolut 获得英国银行牌照，从而可以在国内提供受保护的存款服务并扩展受监管业务。牌照为其增长打开了通道，但也意味着将面临更密切的监管和合规、资本要求。

items.title_en: Roblox is minting teen millionaires
items.title_zh: Roblox 让青少年成为百万富翁
items.summary_en: Roblox's creator economy continues to generate teen millionaires as developers monetize popular games and experiences.
items.summary_zh: Roblox 的创作者经济让不少青少年成为百万富翁，开发者通过热门游戏与体验实现可观收入。文章分析平台经济、分成机制及对游戏行业与青少年创业的影响。

items.title_en: MacBook Neo Is a 'Shock' to the PC Industry: Asus Co-CEO
items.title_zh: MacBook Neo 将对 PC 行业造成‘冲击’：华硕联合首席执行官
items.summary_en: An Asus executive frame‑up framing the MacBook Neo as a disruptor to the PC market, signaling Apple’s ongoing impact on portable hardware. The remarks hint at shifts in design, performance, and ecosystem lock‑in.
items.summary_zh: 华硕高管将 MacBook Neo 描绘为对 PC 行业的颠覆性力量，显示 Apple 在便携硬件领域的持续影响。此言论预示设计、性能与生态体系绑定等方面的市场变化。

items.title_en: Building a TB-303 from Scratch
items.title_zh: 从零开始打造 TB-303 合成器
items.summary_en: A hands‑on tutorial walks through building a TB-303-style bass synth from scratch, covering circuitry, component selection, and sequencing behavior. It's a practical resource for hardware synth builders and anyone interested in the analog design choices that produce the classic acid bass sound.
items.summary_zh: 这份动手教程逐步指导如何从零实现一个 TB-303 风格的低音合成器，涵盖电路设计、元件选择与步进序列器的行为。对硬件合成器爱好者和研究生成经典酸性低音音色的模拟设计细节的人来说非常实用。

items.title_en: Julia Snail – An Emacs Development Environment for Julia Like Clojure's Cider
items.title_zh: Julia Snail——为 Julia 提供的 Emacs 开发环境，类似 Clojure 的 Cider
items.summary_en: Julia Snail integrates Julia with Emacs to deliver an interactive, REPL-driven development workflow similar to Cider for Clojure. It brings enhanced tooling, inline docs, and a more ergonomic path for Julia developers.
items.summary_zh: Julia Snail 将 Julia 与 Emacs 结合，提供类似 Cider 的交互式开发工作流。它带来改进的工具链、内联文档以及更高效的 Julia 开发体验。

items.title_en: Gemma Needs Help
items.title_zh: Gemma 需要帮助
items.summary_en: A provocative LessWrong post centered on Gemma, a fictional AI agent, prompting discussion about alignment, governance, and the safeguards needed as AI capabilities grow.
items.summary_zh: 以虚构的 AI 代理 Gemma 为核心，促发关于对齐、治理与在能力提升时需要的安全机制的讨论。

items.title_en: Exploring the ocean with Raspberry Pi–powered marine robots
items.title_zh: 用树莓派驱动的海洋机器人探索海洋
items.summary_en: Raspberry Pi-powered marine robots are used to explore underwater environments, leveraging affordable sensors and open-source software. This showcases how accessible hardware can contribute to oceanography and education.
items.summary_zh: 树莓派驱动的海洋机器人用于探测海洋环境，结合低成本传感器与开源软件，展示了入门级硬件在海洋研究与教育中的潜力。

items.title_en: Invoker Commands API
items.title_zh: Invoker Commands API
items.summary_en: The Invoker Commands API proposes a standard way for web apps to request invoking OS or other apps via commands, enabling deeper integration but requiring careful security and permission modeling to avoid abuse.
items.summary_zh: Invoker Commands API 提出一种网页应用通过命令请求调用操作系统或其他应用的标准化方式，带来更深层的集成，但需谨慎设计安全与权限模型以防滥用。

items.title_en: Visualizing Ukkonen's Suffix Tree Algorithm
items.title_zh: 可视化 Ukkonen 后缀树算法
items.summary_en: Interactive visualizations break down Ukkonen's linear-time suffix tree construction, making its online extension rules and suffix links easier to grasp. For engineers working on string indexes, compression, or pattern matching, the visual walkthrough clarifies why the algorithm is efficient and how to implement it correctly.
items.summary_zh: 交互式可视化将 Ukkonen 的线性时间后缀树构造过程拆解开来，帮助理解在线扩展规则和后缀链接。对从事字符串索引、压缩或模式匹配的工程师而言，这种图解有助于掌握算法高效性的原理及正确实现方法。

items.title_en: I used pulsar detection techniques to turn a phone into a watch timegrapher
items.title_zh: 我用脉冲星探测技术把手机变成手表走时检测仪
items.summary_en: Using pulsar detection techniques, the author turns a smartphone into a watch timing instrument, enabling affordable timekeeping analysis. Demonstrates crossover between radio astronomy methods and consumer hardware.
items.summary_zh: 通过脉冲星探测方法将手机变为手表走时检测仪，展示了无线天文技术对消费设备的跨界应用。

items.title_en: PeppyOS: A simpler alternative to ROS 2 (now with containers support)
items.title_zh: PeppyOS：更简化的 ROS 2 替代方案（现支持容器）
items.summary_en: PeppyOS offers a lightweight alternative to ROS 2 that emphasizes simplicity and now adds container support for easier deployment and isolation. It targets teams and hobbyists who want a smaller, more predictable runtime for robots, trading off some of ROS 2's ecosystem breadth for lower complexity and faster setup.
items.summary_zh: PeppyOS 提供了一个面向简化和易用性的 ROS 2 替代方案，并新增了容器支持以便更方便地部署与隔离。它适合希望获得更小、更可预测运行时的团队与爱好者，用更低的复杂度和更快的上手换取了比 ROS 2 更窄的生态功能。

items.title_en: Pike: To Exit or Not to Exit
items.title_zh: Pike：退出还是继续押注下一轮退出
items.summary_en: A decision framework for startups that weighs whether to exit now or gamble on the next milestone. The piece outlines a probabilistic approach to balancing risk, timing, and potential upside.
items.summary_zh: 提供一个创业决策框架，帮助权衡是现在退出还是继续押注下一轮退出。文章用概率方法平衡风险、时机和潜在收益。

items.title_en: 5,200 holes carved into a Peruvian mountain left by an ancient economy
items.title_zh: 秘鲁山上开凿的 5,200 个洞穴来自古代经济活动
items.summary_en: Archaeologists mapped some 5,200 small holes carved into a Peruvian mountainside and interpret them as the remnants of large-scale pre-Columbian extraction or storage activities. The pattern and scale point to organized labor and resource management, offering a window into the logistical complexity of ancient local economies.
items.summary_zh: 考古学家在秘鲁山坡上记录了约 5,200 个小洞，认为它们是大规模前哥伦布时期开采或存储活动的遗迹。洞穴的分布与规模表明存在有组织的劳力和资源管理，反映了古代地方经济的后勤复杂性。

items.title_en: When the chain becomes the product: Seven years inside a token-funded venture
items.title_zh: 当链条成为产品：在代币融资企业的七年内景
items.summary_en: A seven‑year first‑person account shows how token issuance can shift a startup's priorities, making token economics and secondary markets central to product decisions. The author recounts how incentives, governance complexity, and regulatory uncertainty can eclipse user‑centric development and create long‑term operational burdens.
items.summary_zh: 作者以七年亲历者视角描述代币发行如何改变初创公司的优先级，让代币经济和二级市场成为产品决策的核心。文中回顾了激励机制、治理复杂性和监管不确定性如何压过以用户为中心的开发，并带来长期运营负担。

items.title_en: Because Algospeak
items.title_zh: 因为 algospeak（算法语言）
items.summary_en: An exploration of algospeak—the language people use to describe algorithmic systems and online ranking—and how terminology shapes policy debates and user understanding of platforms.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 algospeak（算法语言）这一描述算法系统与在线排序的语言如何影响政策讨论与用户对平台推荐机制的理解。

items.title_en: Bippy: React Internals Toolkit
items.title_zh: Bippy：React 内部工具箱
items.summary_en: Bippy offers a toolkit for inspecting and understanding React internals, including the Fiber architecture and rendering lifecycle. It helps developers reason about performance limits beyond conventional APIs.
items.summary_zh: Bippy 提供一套用于分析与理解 React 内部的工具集，涵盖 Fiber 架构与渲染生命周期，帮助开发者超越表层 API 来评估性能。

items.title_en: Bypassing PatchGuard on Windows x64 (2005)
items.title_zh: 绕过 Windows x64 PatchGuard（2005）
items.summary_en: This historical write-up documents techniques used in 2005 to bypass PatchGuard, Microsoft’s kernel integrity protection on x64 Windows, illuminating early methods attackers used to subvert kernel defenses. It serves as a useful historical reference for how kernel-level protections and countermeasures evolved over the past two decades.
items.summary_zh: 这篇历史性文档记录了 2005 年绕过 PatchGuard（微软在 x64 Windows 上的内核完整性保护）所用的方法，揭示了早期攻击者如何破坏内核防护。它是理解过去二十多年内核级防护与对策演进的有价值历史参考。

items.title_en: Support for Aquantia AQC113 and AQC113C Ethernet Controllers on FreeBSD
items.title_zh: FreeBSD 对 Aquantia AQC113/AQC113C 以太网控制器的支持
items.summary_en: FreeBSD gains driver support for Aquantia AQC113 and AQC113C Ethernet controllers, expanding hardware compatibility. The update improves performance and reliability for users deploying these NICs in servers and desktops.
items.summary_zh: FreeBSD 增强了对 Aquantia AQC113/AQC113C 以太网控制器的驱动支持，提升了这类网卡在服务器与桌面环境中的性能与稳定性。

items.title_en: Traditional tales from Cornwall, with maps for stories' locations
items.title_zh: 康沃尔传统故事及其故事地点地图
items.summary_en: A digital humanities project collecting Cornwall’s traditional tales and mapping the geographical locations tied to each story. It offers a rich, interactive resource for folklore enthusiasts and educators.
items.summary_zh: 一个数字人文项目，收集康沃尔的传统故事并将故事发生地点用地图标注，面向民俗爱好者和教育者提供互动资源。

items.title_en: Show HN: Safelaunch – Validates your environment before you push to production
items.title_zh: Show HN: Safelaunch——在你推送生产环境前校验环境
items.summary_en: Safelaunch validates your deployment environment before pushing to production, catching misconfigurations and drift early. It’s a practical safeguard for teams aiming to reduce post‑deploy incidents.
items.summary_zh: Safelaunch 在推送生产环境前对部署环境进行校验，及早发现配置错误与漂移。对希望降低上线后故障的团队来说，是一项实用的防护工具。
